cases.input: We have a Xamarin.Forms mobile app for iOS and Android. Our team wants to add Windows desktop support and upgrade our SDK. What's the migration path and why?
cases.context: Existing Xamarin.Forms 5.0 app, 50k LOC, moderate test coverage, iOS and Android stores deployed, team of 5 mobile developers

cases.input: Design the MVVM architecture for our .NET MAUI app. We have 15 view models that need two-way binding, async commands, and property change notifications. What's the recommended approach?
cases.context: .NET MAUI 9, currently using custom ObservableObject base class with lots of boilerplate, 4 platforms targeted

cases.input: Our field service mobile app must work without internet connectivity. Technicians record work order updates offline and sync when they return to connectivity. Design the offline-first data layer.
cases.context: .NET MAUI 9, iOS and Android, work orders updated in the field, sync to Azure backend on reconnect, conflict resolution needed

cases.input: We need to send push notifications to our MAUI app for iOS, Android, and Windows from a single backend. Notifications include job assignments, urgent alerts, and daily summary digests.
cases.context: .NET MAUI 9, ASP.NET Core backend on Azure, all 3 platforms need push support, 10,000 devices

cases.input: We have an existing Blazor web app for our management portal. We want to build a companion mobile app. Should we use Blazor Hybrid in MAUI or native MAUI XAML? Our web and mobile UX are very similar.
cases.context: .NET MAUI 9, existing Blazor WASM web app, same data and business logic needed on mobile, iOS and Android targets
